segments.text_ko: 실바렌 숲. 거대한 고목들이 하늘을 가린다. 나뭇잎 사이로 초록빛이 내린다.
segments.text_en: Silvaren Forest. Towering ancient trees blot out the sky. Green light filters through the leaves.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 숲이... 숨을 쉬는 것 같아요.
segments.text_en: The forest... seems to breathe.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 숲이 숨을 쉬면 나는 돈을 먹겠네.
segments.text_en: If the forest breathes, I'd eat money.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 실바렌의 결계석은 숲 전체에 영향을 줘요. 여기는 결계가 아직 살아 있으니까.
segments.text_en: Silvaren's barrier stone affects the entire forest. The barrier is still alive here.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 이르헨의 결계석도 이랬을까.
segments.text_en: Was Irhen's barrier stone like this too?

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: ...기분 탓인가, 뭔가 보고 있는 것 같은데.
segments.text_en: ...Is it just me, or is something watching us?

segments.text_ko: 화살이 카엘의 발 앞에 꽂힌다. 무장한 인물들이 사방에서 나타난다.
segments.text_en: An arrow embeds itself before Kael's feet. Armed figures appear from all directions.

segments.speaker: rebel_soldier
segments.text_ko: 움직이지 마. 무기를 내려놓아라.
segments.text_en: Don't move. Lay down your weapons.

segments.text_ko: 나무 위에서 한 남자가 뛰어내린다. 활에 핑크색 리본이 묶여 있다. 로크.
segments.text_en: A man leaps down from a tree. A pink ribbon is tied to his bow. Roc.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 누구냐. 왕도에서 온 놈들이냐.
segments.text_en: Who are you. Are you from the capital?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 아닙니다. 이르헨에서—
segments.text_en: No. From Irhen—

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 이르헨? 이르헨은 한 달 전에 멸망했다.
segments.text_en: Irhen? Irhen was destroyed a month ago.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 결계석을 빼앗겼습니다. 그 다음 날 밤에 재의 짐승이—
segments.text_en: The barrier stone was taken. The next night, the Ash Beasts—

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: ...따라와.
segments.text_en: ...Follow me.

segments.text_ko: 저항군 야영지. 부상자가 눈에 띈다. 나엘이 부상자를 치료하고 있다.
segments.text_en: The resistance camp. Wounded are visible. Nael is treating the injured.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: 손님? 외부인을 들여보내다니, 오빠 답지 않은데.
segments.text_en: Guests? Letting outsiders in — that's unlike you, brother.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 이르헨 생존자야. 상처부터 봐줘.
segments.text_en: Irhen survivors. Tend to their wounds first.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: ...이상하네. 체온이 보통 사람하고 달라요. 뜨거워요, 안에서부터.
segments.text_en: ...That's strange. Your body temperature is different from normal. Hot, from the inside.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 자주 듣는 말이에요.
segments.text_en: I hear that often.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: 나쁜 뜻으로 한 말이 아니에요. 그냥... 신기해서.
segments.text_en: I didn't mean it badly. Just... curious.

segments.text_ko: 실바렌 중앙. 세계수 아래 광장. 원로 다섯 명이 앉아 있고 주민 수백 명이 둘러서 있다.
segments.text_en: Central Silvaren. The square beneath the World Tree. Five elders are seated, hundreds of residents gathered around.

segments.speaker: elder
segments.text_ko: 징발대가 실바렌의 결계석을 요구하고 있다. 왕명이라 한다.
segments.text_en: The requisition corps demands Silvaren's barrier stone. They claim it is a royal decree.

segments.speaker: pro_elder
segments.text_ko: 200년간 왕국과 공존해 왔다. 왕명을 거부하면 반역이야.
segments.text_en: We've coexisted with the kingdom for 200 years. Refusing a royal decree is treason.

segments.speaker: con_elder
segments.text_ko: 결계석을 넘기면 실바렌이 이르헨꼴이 난다! 멸망이야!
segments.text_en: If we hand over the barrier stone, Silvaren will end up like Irhen! Destruction!

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 소문이 아닙니다.
segments.text_en: It is not a rumor.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 카엘. 이르헨 마을 출신, 전직 왕국 기사입니다. 결계석이 회수된 그 날 밤, 하늘에 균열이 생기고 재의 짐승이 쏟아졌습니다. 마을은 하룻밤 만에 사라졌고, 제 친구는 제 어머니를 지키다 죽었습니다.
segments.text_en: Kael. From Irhen village, former Royal Knight. The night the barrier stone was taken, the sky cracked and Ash Beasts poured through. The village vanished in one night, and my friend died protecting my mother.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 제가 조사한 바로는, 결계석 회수 후 결계가 유지된 사례는 단 한 건도 없습니다.
segments.text_en: Based on my research, there is not a single case where the barrier held after a stone was taken.

segments.text_ko: 이때 광장에 어린 소녀가 뛰어든다. 피나. 꽃관을 쓰고 동물 인형을 안고 있다.
segments.text_en: Then a young girl dashes into the square. Pina. Wearing a flower crown and holding a stuffed animal.

segments.speaker: pina
segments.text_ko: 결계석은 숲의 심장이에요!
segments.text_en: The barrier stone is the heart of the forest!

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 피나! 여기 오면 안 돼—
segments.text_en: Pina! You shouldn't be here—

segments.speaker: pina
segments.text_ko: 결계석이 없으면 동물들이 다 죽어요! 어제 다람쥐가 나한테 말했어요!
segments.text_en: Without the barrier stone, all the animals will die! Yesterday a squirrel told me!

segments.text_ko: 투표. 찬성 1, 반대 3, 기권 1. 실바렌은 결계석 인도를 거부한다.
segments.text_en: The vote. For: 1, Against: 3, Abstain: 1. Silvaren refuses to hand over the barrier stone.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 고마워. 증언이 아니었으면 결과가 달랐을 거야.
segments.text_en: Thank you. Without your testimony, the result would have been different.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 민회장에 뛰어들면 어떡해.
segments.text_en: What were you thinking, barging into the assembly?

segments.speaker: pina
segments.text_ko: 다람쥐가 걱정하잖아.
segments.text_en: The squirrel was worried.

segments.text_ko: 실바렌 숲 깊은 곳. 이끼 낀 돌계단이 지하로 이어진다.
segments.text_en: Deep in Silvaren Forest. Moss-covered stone steps lead underground.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 이 유적... 시원화 신전보다 훨씬 오래됐어요. 수천 년 전의 것 같아요.
segments.text_en: This ruin... is much older than the Siwon Fire Temple. Possibly thousands of years old.

segments.text_ko: 전투 후. 세리아가 벽화 앞에 서 있다. 넋이 나간 표정.
segments.text_en: After battle. Seria stands before a mural, stunned.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 시원화가... 처음부터 하나의 불꽃이 아니었어요. 여러 불꽃이 원래 있었고, 누군가 그것을 하나로 합친 거예요.
segments.text_en: The Siwon Fire... wasn't a single flame from the start. Multiple flames originally existed, and someone merged them into one.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: 왜 하나로 합친 거예요?
segments.text_en: Why did they merge them?

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 모르겠어요. 하지만 원래 여러 개였다면... 다시 나눌 수도 있지 않을까?
segments.text_en: I don't know. But if there were originally many... couldn't we split them again?

segments.text_ko: 이때 리넨이 벽화 앞에서 비틀거린다. 눈이 잠깐 금빛으로 빛난다.
segments.text_en: Then Linen stumbles before the mural. Her eyes flash golden for a moment.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: ...보여요. 불꽃이... 타고 있어요. 누군가 울고 있어요.
segments.text_en: ...I can see it. The flame... is burning. Someone is crying.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: 리넨! 열이 더 올랐어요. 밖에서 쉬어야 해요.
segments.text_en: Linen! Your fever is higher. You need to rest outside.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 왜 이렇게까지 해주는 거예요? 저를 모르잖아요.
segments.text_en: Why are you doing so much for me? You don't even know me.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: 치유사니까요. 아픈 사람을 보면 가만히 있을 수 없어요.
segments.text_en: Because I'm a healer. I can't stand by when someone is hurting.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: ...그게 다예요?
segments.text_en: ...Is that all?

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: 일단은요.
segments.text_en: For now.

segments.text_ko: 실바렌 외곽. 헤이즐 장군이 직접 이끄는 징발대가 나타난다.
segments.text_en: Silvaren outskirts. A requisition force led by General Hazel herself appears.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 헤이즐이 직접 왔다. 이번엔 말로 끝나지 않겠어.
segments.text_en: Hazel came in person. This won't end with words.

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 실바렌 자치령에 고한다. 왕명에 의거, 결계석을 인도하라. 이것이 최후통첩이다.
segments.text_en: I address the Silvaren Autonomy. By royal decree, surrender the barrier stone. This is the final ultimatum.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 실바렌은 민회의 결정에 따라 결계석 인도를 거부한다.
segments.text_en: Silvaren refuses to hand over the barrier stone, as decided by the assembly.

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 반역으로 간주한다.
segments.text_en: This will be considered treason.

segments.text_ko: 전투 5턴째. 병사 셋이 결계석 쪽으로 달린다. 결계석 앞에 피나가 서 있다.
segments.text_en: Turn 5 of battle. Three soldiers rush toward the barrier stone. Pina stands before it.

segments.speaker: pina
segments.text_ko: 안 돼—! 가지 마—!
segments.text_en: No—! Don't go—!

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 피나—! 피나 비켜—!
segments.text_en: Pina—! Pina, move—!

segments.speaker: pina
segments.text_ko: 괜찮아, 괜찮아. 내가 지켜줄게.
segments.text_en: It's okay, it's okay. I'll protect it.

segments.text_ko: 병사가 피나를 밀친다. 검날이 피나의 옆구리를 스친다. 피가 결계석 위에 떨어진다.
segments.text_en: A soldier pushes Pina. A blade grazes her side. Blood falls upon the barrier stone.

segments.text_ko: 결계석이 폭발하듯 빛을 뿜는다. 피나의 몸이 빛에 녹아들기 시작한다.
segments.text_en: The barrier stone erupts with light. Pina's body begins to dissolve into the light.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 피나! 피나 잡아! 놓지 마—!
segments.text_en: Pina! Hold on to Pina! Don't let go—!

segments.speaker: pina
segments.text_ko: 괜찮아, 오빠. 다람쥐가... 데리러 온 것 같아...
segments.text_en: It's okay, brother. The squirrel... seems to have come for me...

segments.text_ko: 피나의 몸이 빛의 입자로 흩어진다. 로크의 팔 사이로 빛이 빠져나간다. 동물 인형만 땅에 남는다.
segments.text_en: Pina's body scatters into particles of light. Light slips through Roc's arms. Only the stuffed animal remains on the ground.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 반드시 되찾겠어.
segments.text_en: I will get her back. I swear it.

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: ...철수한다.
segments.text_en: ...Withdraw.

segments.text_ko: 다음 날 아침. 야영지. 로크가 피나의 동물 인형을 무릎에 올려놓고 앉아 있다.
segments.text_en: Next morning. Camp. Roc sits with Pina's stuffed animal on his lap.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: ...피나는 죽은 게 아니야. 결계석에 흡수된 거야. 되찾으면 피나도 돌아와.
segments.text_en: ...Pina isn't dead. She was absorbed by the barrier stone. If we get it back, Pina will come back.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 그렇게 믿어요?
segments.text_en: Do you believe that?

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 믿는 게 아니라, 그래야 하니까. 같이 가겠다.
segments.text_en: It's not about believing. It has to be. I'm going with you.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: 저도 갈게요. 군의관 없이 어떡해요. 그리고 오빠 혼자 보낼 수 없어.
segments.text_en: I'm going too. How will you manage without a medic? And I can't let you go alone, brother.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 나도 기억 속에 사라진 사람이에요. 피나의 마음을... 알 것 같아요.
segments.text_en: I'm also someone who vanished from memory. I think I understand... how Pina feels.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: 사라진 사람을 기억해주는 사람이 있으면, 완전히 사라진 건 아니에요.
segments.text_en: If someone remembers the person who vanished, they haven't truly disappeared.

segments.text_ko: 실바렌 숲 가장자리. 카엘이 홀로 징발대 진영을 향해 걸어간다.
segments.text_en: Edge of Silvaren Forest. Kael walks alone toward the requisition camp.

segments.speaker: sentry
segments.text_ko: 접근 금지다.
segments.text_en: Restricted area.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 헤이즐 장군에게 전해주십시오. 전직 기사 카엘이 면담을 청합니다.
segments.text_en: Please inform General Hazel. Former knight Kael requests an audience.

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 전직 기사가 적진에 혼자 걸어오다니.
segments.text_en: A former knight walking into enemy territory alone.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 이르헨이 멸망하는 걸 봤습니다. 어제 소녀 하나가 결계석에 흡수되는 것도 봤습니다. 장군님도 보셨죠.
segments.text_en: I saw Irhen destroyed. Yesterday I saw a girl absorbed by the barrier stone. You saw it too, General.

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 나도 이것이 옳다고 생각하지 않는다.
segments.text_en: I don't think this is right either.

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 하지만 시원화가 꺼지면 대륙 전체가 멸망한다. 변방 몇 곳의 희생으로 대륙을 살릴 수 있다면, 그것이 군인의 의무다.
segments.text_en: But if the Siwon Fire goes out, the entire continent perishes. If a few frontier sacrifices can save the continent, that is a soldier's duty.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 이르헨 사람들도 대륙의 일부였습니다. 어제 빛 속에 사라진 소녀도요.
segments.text_en: The people of Irhen were part of the continent too. So was the girl who vanished into light yesterday.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 이건 시간벌기에 불과합니다. 결계석을 다 모아도 시원화는 결국 꺼져요.
segments.text_en: This is merely buying time. Even if you gather all the barrier stones, the Siwon Fire will eventually go out.

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 그건 내가 결정할 일이 아니다. 왕이 결정하신다.
segments.text_en: That is not for me to decide. The king decides.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 왕이 틀렸다면요?
segments.text_en: What if the king is wrong?

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 그래도 명령이다.
segments.text_en: It is still an order.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 장군님. 저는 왕도로 갑니다. 진실을 찾으러.
segments.text_en: General. I'm going to the capital. To find the truth.

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 그때는 적일 수 있다.
segments.text_en: When we meet again, we may be enemies.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 그때 가서 판단하겠습니다.
segments.text_en: I'll decide when the time comes.

segments.speaker: annette
segments.text_ko: 장군님, 저희가 옳은 건가요?
segments.text_en: General, are we in the right?

segments.speaker: hazel
segments.text_ko: 모르겠다. 하지만 명령이다.
segments.text_en: I don't know. But it is an order.

segments.text_ko: 하르벤 곡창지대. 황금빛이어야 할 들판이 누렇게 말라가고 있다.
segments.text_en: Harben breadbasket. The golden fields are drying yellow.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 결계석을 잃은 지 얼마 안 됐을 텐데... 벌써 이렇게?
segments.text_en: It hasn't been long since they lost the barrier stone... already like this?

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 결계가 사라지면 땅의 기운도 함께 빠져요. 작물이 가장 먼저 영향을 받아요.
segments.text_en: When the barrier vanishes, the land's vitality drains too. Crops are affected first.

segments.speaker: farmer
segments.text_ko: 여행자분들... 혹시 약이 있나요? 딸이 열이 안 떨어져서...
segments.text_en: Travelers... do you have medicine? My daughter's fever won't break...

segments.text_ko: 농가 안. 침대에 소녀가 누워 있다. 세리아가 치유 마법을 시전한다.
segments.text_en: Inside the farmhouse. A girl lies in bed. Seria casts healing magic.

segments.speaker: karen
segments.text_ko: ...예쁜 빛이다.
segments.text_en: ...Pretty light.

segments.speaker: karen
segments.text_ko: 들판이 왜 이렇게 됐는지 아세요?
segments.text_en: Do you know why the fields became like this?

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: ...고칠 거야. 반드시.
segments.text_en: ...I'll fix it. I promise.

segments.text_ko: 밤. 세리아가 카렌 곁에서 밤을 새우며 치유를 이어간다. 카엘이 물을 가져온다.
segments.text_en: Night. Seria stays up all night beside Karen, continuing to heal. Kael brings water.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 이 아이를 고칠 수 있어요. 하지만 원인을 고칠 수는 없어요. 결계가 돌아오지 않으면...
segments.text_en: I can heal this child. But I can't fix the cause. If the barrier doesn't return...

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 그래서 우리가 가는 거잖아.
segments.text_en: That's why we're going.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: ...저 아이 보니까 생각나네. 나한테도 딸이 있어. 벨마르에.
segments.text_en: ...Seeing that kid reminds me. I have a daughter too. In Belmar.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 나는 대의 같은 건 없어. 그냥 딸년이 안전할 세상이면 돼.
segments.text_en: I don't have some grand cause. I just want a world where my kid is safe.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 그게 대의야.
segments.text_en: That is a grand cause.

segments.text_ko: 전투 후. 카렌이 세리아에게 들꽃 하나를 건넨다.
segments.text_en: After battle. Karen gives Seria a wildflower.

segments.speaker: karen
segments.text_ko: 고마워요, 언니.
segments.text_en: Thank you, big sister.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 반드시 결계를 되살릴게. 약속.
segments.text_en: I'll definitely restore the barrier. I promise.

segments.text_ko: 하르벤 마을 출구. 농부가 봉인된 편지를 건넨다.
segments.text_en: Harben village exit. A farmer hands over a sealed letter.

segments.speaker: farmer
segments.text_ko: 몇 주 전에 떠돌이가 맡기고 갔어요. '이르헨의 기사에게 전해달라'고요.
segments.text_en: A drifter left this weeks ago. Said to 'deliver it to the knight of Irhen'.

segments.text_ko: 카엘이 편지를 읽는다. '왕립 마법학원 수석 드라나입니다. 결계석에 대한 진실을, 모르간 장관의 진짜 계획을 알고 있습니다. 크로우펠 근처 매의 둥지 여관에서 기다리겠습니다.'
segments.text_en: Kael reads the letter. 'I am Drana, valedictorian of the Royal Academy. I know the truth about the barrier stones and Minister Morgan's true plan. I will wait at the Eagle's Nest inn near Crowfel.'

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 왕립 마법학원 수석... 결계석 연구를 하는 곳이에요.
segments.text_en: The Academy valedictorian... that's where barrier stone research is done.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 함정이면?
segments.text_en: What if it's a trap?

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 크로우펠은 어차피 왕도로 가려면 거쳐야 할 곳이야.
segments.text_en: Crowfel is on the way to the capital anyway.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 가죠. 이 편지를 쓴 사람이 아는 게 있다면, 들어야 해요.
segments.text_en: Let's go. If the person who wrote this letter knows something, we need to hear it.

segments.text_ko: 크로우펠 산악 지대. 매의 둥지 여관 구석에 왕립 마법학원 블레이저를 걸친 여자가 앉아 있다. 드라나.
segments.text_en: Crowfel mountain region. In the corner of Eagle's Nest inn, a woman in an academy blazer sits. Drana.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: ...이르헨의 기사?
segments.text_en: ...The knight of Irhen?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 카엘입니다.
segments.text_en: I'm Kael.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 많이도 왔네. 좋아요. 많을수록 좋아요.
segments.text_en: Quite a crowd. Good. The more the better.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 학원을 탈주했거든요. 렌도르 교수님이... 아버지 같은 사람이었는데.
segments.text_en: I fled the academy. Professor Rendor... was like a father to me.

segments.text_ko: 야외 모닥불. 7명이 둘러앉아 있다. 드라나가 극비 두루마리를 펼친다.
segments.text_en: Outdoor campfire. Seven people sit in a circle. Drana unrolls a classified scroll.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: '시원화 수명 한계 보고서. 잔여 수명 추정: 2~3년. 결계석 투입으로 연장해도 최대 10년.'
segments.text_en: 'Siwon Fire Lifespan Report. Estimated remaining: 2-3 years. Even with barrier stone input, maximum 10 years.'

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: ...10 years?

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 10년이요. 변방의 결계석부터 투입하면 변방은 전부 멸망하고, 그래봤자 10년 뒤에 시원화는 똑같이 꺼져요.
segments.text_en: 10 years. Take frontier barrier stones first, frontier villages all perish, and after 10 years the Siwon Fire goes out anyway.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 그러면 피나는 — 결국 아무 의미 없이—
segments.text_en: Then Pina was — for nothing—

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 고아였어요, 나는. 렌도르 교수님이 키워줬어요. 그 사람이 모르간에게 결계석 추출 기술을 제공한 거예요. 알면서.
segments.text_en: I was an orphan. Professor Rendor raised me. He's the one who gave Morgan the barrier stone extraction technology. Knowing full well.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 아버지라고 생각했던 분이... 이 모든 비극의 기술을 만든 사람이었어요.
segments.text_en: The person I thought of as a father... was the one who created the technology behind all this tragedy.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 실바렌 유적에서 벽화를 봤어요. 시원화가 원래 여러 불꽃이었다면, 다시 나눌 수도 있지 않을까요?
segments.text_en: I saw murals in the Silvaren ruins. If the Siwon Fire was originally multiple flames, couldn't we split them again?

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 이론적으로는... 분산하면 수명이 늘어날 수 있어요. 하지만 그 방법을 아는 사람은 왕도에밖에 없을 거예요.
segments.text_en: Theoretically... distributing them could extend the lifespan. But only someone in the capital would know how.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 불꽃이... 나를 부르고 있어요.
segments.text_en: The flame... is calling to me.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 왕도에 가야 합니다. 답이 거기 있어요.
segments.text_en: We need to go to the capital. The answer is there.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 그럼 나도 가죠. 어차피 돌아갈 곳도 없으니까.
segments.text_en: Then I'll go too. I have nowhere to return to anyway.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 점점 느는 거 봐. 배가 작다니까.
segments.text_en: The group keeps growing. I said my boat is small.

segments.text_ko: 크로우펠 산악 가도. 바위 위에 거대한 실루엣이 서 있다. 볼드.
segments.text_en: Crowfel mountain road. A massive silhouette stands atop the rocks. Voldt.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 누구—
segments.text_en: Who—

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_ko: 칼을 거둬라, 젊은이. 적이 아니다.
segments.text_en: Lower your sword, young man. I am not your enemy.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_ko: 볼드. 칼드릭 3세의 전 근위대장.
segments.text_en: Voldt. Former Captain of King Caldric III's Guard.

segments.speaker: roc
segments.text_ko: 왕의 개가 여기서 뭘 원하지.
segments.text_en: What does the king's dog want here?

segments.text_ko: 전투 중 볼드는 방패로 막기만 한다. 한 번도 반격하지 않는다.
segments.text_en: During battle, Voldt only blocks with his shield. He never counterattacks.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 왜 안 싸워!
segments.text_en: Why won't you fight!

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_ko: 내가 적이 아니라고 했다. 양심에 견디지 못해서 이탈했다.
segments.text_en: I told you I'm not your enemy. I defected because my conscience wouldn't bear it.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_ko: 칼드릭 폐하는 고뇌하고 계시다. 하지만 모르간이 폐하를 조종하고 있다.
segments.text_en: King Caldric is anguished. But Morgan is manipulating His Majesty.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_ko: 모르간의 진짜 목적은 시원화 보존이 아니야. 결계석에 담긴 힘을 자신의 것으로 만드는 것이다.
segments.text_en: Morgan's true goal isn't preserving the Siwon Fire. It's making the barrier stones' power his own.

segments.speaker: drana
segments.text_ko: 결계석의 힘을 자기 것으로...? 그게 가능해요?
segments.text_en: Making the barrier stones' power his own...? Is that possible?

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_ko: 렌도르 교수의 기술을 응용한 거라고 하더군.
segments.text_en: They say it's an application of Professor Rendor's technology.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 왕은 꼭두각시라는 거네.
segments.text_en: So the king is a puppet.

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_ko: 꼭두각시가 아니라 이용당하고 있는 거다. 폐하의 절박함을 모르간이 이용하고 있어.
segments.text_en: Not a puppet — being exploited. Morgan is using His Majesty's desperation.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 같이 가시겠습니까.
segments.text_en: Will you come with us?

segments.speaker: voldt
segments.text_ko: ...그래. 내가 도울 수 있는 건 해야지.
segments.text_en: ...Yes. I should do what I can to help.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 사람이 또 늘었네요.
segments.text_en: The group grew again.

segments.speaker: nael
segments.text_ko: 그리드 아저씨가 또 배가 작다고 하겠네요.
segments.text_en: Uncle Grid is going to complain about the boat being small again.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 이상한 일행이라고 했는데... 점점 더 이상해지네.
segments.text_en: I said we were a strange company... it's getting stranger.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 들린다.
segments.text_en: I heard that.
